title: Update webdriverio to version 4.2.15 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.2.15.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.2.15
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of webdriverio. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 16 commits . - [`65172a3`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/65172a3bb6c42200e8d2894d5af0fa4b61d7c9a6) v4.2.15 - [`d164092`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/d164092932ef6dfb18ff1ea8613c5c0a1790338d) updated changelog - [`947fe9f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/947fe9fdc05ff9a28c95fbaff3b0fba79ff5723c) refetch elements again - [`43681c5`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/43681c5c95376786ad63b30be68cf95535c31dce) updated changelog [ci skip] - [`0eaee8d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/0eaee8d9bb3c6d2289fe89c116ac8b81a94bb157) v4.2.14 - [`8ce8a95`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/8ce8a95b578a3a0e732c215950e76189b807576d) add more information to start and end event - [`3660b62`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/3660b626b01bc8ffc3c1fdf43f395ac52b7b91d2) v4.2.13 - [`cfaca5e`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/cfaca5e9b15dea99aef2a081a2ace10a98c5ead3) fixed elements result propagation - closes #1589 - [`cd08c0f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/cd08c0febe962029503964e7b7e21eaa600f018a) v4.2.12 - [`384f91d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/384f91d21b17cc906dd6c9c66513de377f477b42) Update contributors - [`c299e6a`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c299e6a3ef59f55d02873802d5e5efcfb027f855) fixed jasmine example - closes webdriverio/wdio-jasmine-framework#7 - [`9b519bc`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/9b519bc0b652e8bac845f3e1ce2589cb75c913c2) allow to define multiple files in spec arg - closes #1579 - [`63aa847`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/63aa847428f5a4b9815f87bad36bc624c9fbfb8e) fixed cucumber example spec [skip ci] - [`b6f1819`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/b6f1819e408f311352acbde1f604e1adb7faefd9) fixed direct selector regex - closes #1577 - [`2b9d405`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/2b9d4054b564c25c04cf69c537dde854addae4b5) Merge pull request #1572 from hungrydavid/master There are 16 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/3f07d0f186ab15ff4d4c80efbae6a14e03812b1a...65172a3bb6c42200e8d2894d5af0fa4b61d7c9a6). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
